title: Uttaradhyayana Sutra: The Last Teachings of Mahavira
description: Mahavira's final discourse before death: on karma, non-violence, and the path to liberation.
introduction: Mahavira's final discourse before death: on karma, non-violence, and the path to liberation.

translation.original_text: I shall now expound the doctrine of the law. Listen to me with undivided attention.
